topics.title: Cat Williams Arrest and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the arrest of comedian Cat Williams for carrying a stolen weapon, weighs in on Kirstie Alley's appearance on Oprah, and shares a prank call recorded with Gilbert Gottfried's voice.

topics.title: Artie Fielding's Relationship Frustrations
topics.summary: The studio explores Artie Fielding's growing annoyance with constant questions regarding his personal life and upcoming performance at Carnegie Hall.

topics.title: Comedy Club Incidents and Drug Experiences
topics.summary: The studio discusses recent comedy show controversies, plays several humorous prank calls including one involving an absurd cake order, and shares personal anecdotes regarding past experiences with marijuana and mushrooms.

topics.title: Drug Experiences and Real Doll Discussions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of anecdotes regarding past drug experiences in Los Angeles, a discussion about naming a new real doll after Elizabeth Hasselback, and an extended segment of repetitive audio.

topics.title: Repetitive Sexual Content
topics.summary: The show features a continuous loop of repetitive, sexually explicit statements.

topics.title: IQ Tests and Adult Film Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding IQ tests, the career of adult film actress Ashley Blue, and various television shows.

topics.title: Howard Stern Show Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding the appearance of a former host, New York Knicks basketball performance, television show critiques, and listener feedback.

topics.title: Heidi Cortez Book Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features Heidi Cortez to promote her new book, "Heidi's Bedtime Stories," while discussing the production of her previous radio segments and her interactions with other hosts.

topics.title: Heidi Cortez Shares Sexual Encounters
topics.summary: The studio features Heidi Cortez recounting a detailed sexual encounter on a balcony and discussing her experiences with various men while using a vibrator.

topics.title: Heidi Cortez Book Promotion and Sexual Fantasies
topics.summary: The studio features Heidi Cortez discussing her new book, her experiences with a sex machine, and various sexual fantasies while interacting with the hosts.

topics.title: Heidi Cortez Book Launch and Studio Segments
topics.summary: The studio features Heidi Cortez promoting her new book, "Bedtime Stories," followed by various comedic sketches and interactive phone segments.

topics.title: Radio Industry Rivalry and Musical Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the influence of Howard Stern on Spanish-language radio, critiques Rod Stewart's recent musical output, and previews upcoming segments regarding local news stories and guest appearances.

topics.title: News Segment and Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers various news items including an investigation into a crime staged as a suicide, FCC rulings on broadcast language, the health of televangelist Ed H. Gardner, and Vice President Dick Cheney's hunting trip.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Upcoming Performances
topics.summary: The show covers Kanye West's award show behavior, Michael Jackson's upcoming tribute, various news items including a lawsuit against Britney Spears and reports of Bigfoot sightings, and details regarding Artie Lange's upcoming Carnegie Hall performance.

topics.title: Celebrity News and True Crime Reports
topics.summary: The studio discusses a celebrity's pet passing after 9/11, rumors regarding Chris Rock’s marital status, an athlete's running achievements, and the tragic suicide of a prosecutor involved in a sex crime investigation.
